creator: swear@aa.net
text:
In the "mirrors" chapter:

1) "described here", where "here" is a link, doesn't translate well to
ASCII.

2) The description of the "doc-all" collection doesn't warn people that
it doesn't include the FreeBSD.org web site.  Those who read that the
site's files are part of the Documentation Project might not read far to
the end of the list to read that "doc-all" doesn't mean all of the FDP's
docs.

3) Mention of the "www" collection as "WWW data" is rather nebulous.
================

Fix: patch -d /*/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/mirrors < this-PR
How-To-Repeat: n/a
================
